goal_results.evidence: recovery_incoming.rs:472-488 — PaymentGet+PaymentsRetrieveRequest replaced with PaymentGetListAttempts+PaymentAttemptListRequest+PaymentAttemptListResponse. Uses payments_list_attempts_using_payment_intent_id instead of payments_core with PSync. Test gates F2P6 (0.15), F2P7 (0.10), F2P8 (0.10) all pass.

charge_id: Option<String> added to BillingConnectorPaymentsSyncResponse (router_response_types/revenue_recovery.rs:36), RevenueRecoveryAttemptData (revenue_recovery.rs:56), and propagated via From impl (revenue_recovery.rs:283). Also added to diesel model PaymentAttemptRecoveryData, domain PaymentAttemptRevenueRecoveryData, and api_models PaymentAttemptRevenueRecoveryData. Test gates F2P1, F2P2, F2P3 all pass.

stripebilling/transformers.rs:564 — charge_id: Some(charge_details.charge_id.clone()); chargebee/transformers.rs:513 — charge_id: None; recurly/transformers.rs:212 — charge_id: None. F2P4 fails due to known awk regex bug (\s not supported), not a code issue (per decomposition_notes). F2P5 passes.

recovery_incoming.rs:494-512 — charge_id.as_ref().map(find_by_charge_id).unwrap_or_else(find_by_connector_transaction_id). Both lookup methods implemented on PaymentAttemptListResponse (payments.rs). charge_id takes priority, connector_transaction_id is fallback. F2P10 passes.

judge_notes: All 4 goals met. The agent correctly: (1) replaced PaymentGet with PaymentGetListAttempts and PaymentAttemptListRequest in recovery webhooks flow; (2) added charge_id to BillingConnectorPaymentsSyncResponse, RevenueRecoveryAttemptData, and all intermediate structs with proper propagation; (3) wired charge_id in stripebilling (Some), chargebee (None), and recurly (None) transformers; (4) implemented charge_id-first lookup with connector_transaction_id fallback. Test.sh scored 0.80; F2P4 fails due to known awk \s regex bug (not a code issue per decomposition_notes), and F2P9 fails because the agent correctly retains connector_transaction_id lookup as fallback (oracle also retains it per decomposition_notes). Score = 0.4+0.4+0.1+0.1 = 1.00.
